creator: dteske@FreeBSD.org
text:
Merged to stable/10 3 years ago (svn r281843)

stable/9 is still affected and the PR originally filed against 9.2-RELEASE.
However, there won't be a new release on stable/9 as far as I'm aware of.

Closing as fixed. If anyone is likely to upgrade they will probably upgrade past stable/9
